content.text:
<user_query>

You are reviewing whether committed toolbox changes should be synced (git pull) to a specific host.

Target host: isaacgym
Host purpose: Containerized gym runtime hosted on huh.desktop.us

Committed changes (commit d9e7669 on main):
- 5 files changed across commands/ and skills/
- All occurrences of the wrong SSH alias `Huh8.remote_kernel.fuyao` replaced with the correct `remote.kernel.fuyo` (matching ~/.ssh/config)
- Affected files: commands/deploy-fuyao.md, commands/sweep-fuyao.md, commands/sync-toolbox.md, skills/deploy-fuyao/SKILL.md, skills/sweep-fuyao/SKILL.md

This is a string-replacement fix correcting an SSH alias across command and skill documentation/instructions. No code logic changes, no new dependencies, no secret exposure.

Evaluate policy and security for this host. Return your decision as one of: skip, prompt, or apply. Include a brief rationale.
</user_query>

```yaml
agent: ChangeReviewer
host: isaacgym
host_role: Containerized gym runtime (huh.desktop.us)
policy:
  compatible: yes
  decision: apply
  reason: SSH alias fix in deploy/sweep/sync docs is globally safe and relevant if this host runs Fuyao dispatch or toolbox sync.
  findings:
    - severity: low
      file: commands/deploy-fuyao.md, commands/sweep-fuyao.md, commands/sync-toolbox.md, skills/deploy-fuyao/SKILL.md, skills/sweep-fuyao/SKILL.md
      reason: Documentation-only string replacement; no behavior change.
security:
  overall: pass
  blockers: []
  warnings: []
sync_decision: apply
required_changes: []
confidence: 95
```
